title: Moroccan Corn Fritters
description: Crispy fritters filled with sweet corn and spices, perfect as a snack or side dish.

ingredients.name: Savory spice blend
ingredients.notes: mix of paprika, cumin, and coriander

instructions: In a large bowl, combine corn kernels, savory spice blend, flour, eggs, and water.
Mix well to form a thick batter.
Heat olive oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the oil.
Fry fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
